message:
Add auth modules and fix UTF-8 panics in achievement display

browser/mod.rs:
- Register two new public submodules: anthropic_auth and google_auth.
  These join the existing openai_device module to provide browser-based
  OAuth/authentication flows for Anthropic and Google services.

learn.rs (TutorialEngine achievement banner rendering):
- Replace bare subtraction with saturating_sub when computing padding
  widths for name, description, and rarity lines. If a line exceeds
  inner_width, the subtraction would underflow and panic (usize
  cannot go negative). saturating_sub clamps to 0 instead.
- Fix a potential panic when truncating long achievement descriptions
  that contain multi-byte UTF-8 characters. Slicing at an arbitrary
  byte offset (inner_width - 4) can land in the middle of a multi-byte
  sequence, causing a panic. The new code walks backward to find a
  valid char boundary before slicing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
